Froglok Bonecaster's Robe  
 

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 10
STR: +8 INT: +8 MANA: +40
SV FIRE: +10 SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 3.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Froglok Bonecaster's Robe
Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 10
STR: +8 INT: +8 MANA: +40
SV FIRE: +10 SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 3.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Shining Metallic Robes
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):10, 25, 10
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:3 pp 5 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1950
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:34:11
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 7,333pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 50

Lol
QuoteReply
# May 05 2003 at 6:10 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784332903
View User Forum
86 posts
Monk only? /laugh

This robe is nice. Dark green with black front designs and a gold design on the back. The design reminds me of a monkey's face, but whatever.

This is a sweet robe. I'll use it forever till I get a Warlock's... then I'm dying that kind of a dark red (I'm not a big fan of purple :P). I saw someone with it in bazaar and it was the absolute coolest thing I'd ever seen, with that skull pattern on the back... /drool.
▲ Page top
the idiot monk, sweet robe btw
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2003 at 10:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784058021
2 posts
Ok for the guy that said this should be monk only, if i could just smack you so hard. You are a udder idiot, did you know that? this would be more usuless to a monk than useful. have you ever heard of acrylia reinforced armor? or acrylia studded? both are cheaper on the rathe and are very very useful to monks. I use the acrylia reinforced and its 8str 10sta and 8wis (i could be a little off on those =P) but as my point shows this gives the 8str that that robe has AND THEN SOME. you are no monk, your a wannabe caster, dont shame the monks by being stupid

Hiotaka Skyefire Monk of the 37th season on "The Rathe" "i was born not to be among the fogotten"

# Feb 15 2005 at 2:26 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Actually made me laugh with these two responses.

I'm not sure what aspect of AdamFransisco's post was the silliest. There was the "udder" thing that you picked up on, along with the other typos.

Then there was the fact that he completely missed the fact the original poster was only being sarcastic (see the end of Ueunayyan's post in the brackets).

As if that were not enough, he failed to note that the original post was in 2001, and there was no such thing as acrylia reinforced/studded armor.

#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 24 2002 at 3:42 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yea we were breaking Disco when we saw this guy pop, son of a ***** nuked me for 2200 and then one more that was like 450, needless to say I was gone easily (shaman), but after I was rezzed we all rolled and wouldn't you know it I won that basterds robe and sold it for a good amount of money. Hey, i'm not trying to flame you guys.. anyways my eq has been down for awhile cuz the pc i had couldn't support it but i recently got a new one! :D in the meantime i introduced my friend in real life, to everquest and i have a level 4 necro on his account, for items (that i can remember) i have this robe, batskull earrings, shissar dagger, stein of mogguk(?), and some other decent stuff, if someone has more necro items to trade/sell on Povar gimme an email or post on here, Thanks!

I traded a Staff of Living Sands (worth approx. 1800pp) for this robe. The cleric I got it from was aware that it could sell for more, but he couldn't use it and he really wanted the staff and didn't have any cash, and so he traded for it.

As far as color, on my monitor it looks completely black, pattern barely visible.

Well ever since I got a Cloak of Shadows (About 8-10k on fennin ro) I have had quite a bit of money for my level. I bought this robe to twink my enchanter. It's a very nice robe but I sold it and bought an shiny metallic robe for half the price so i could buy other things. But it's a cool looking robe, has good stats, and... well it's expensive but worth it.

7 posts
gosh!! this goes to the guy that posted near the top, NOT EVERY FRIGGIN ROBE THAT GIVES MONK STUFF ISN'T FOR MONKS. "Oh look, it gives strength and has low weight..it should be for monks!" after that you should say, "Look! I'm and idiot!" not all robes that are good arn't for monks, casters need the str too to carry stuff. stop acting stoopid.

QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2002 at 8:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252729836
Scholar
17 posts
not to disagree with that earlier person completely, but this is not at all a low wt for a monk with a wt budget. most real nice monk chest slots r sub 1 stone in wt. although my scaly monk sure loves the look of robes when just runnin about, they often sit in the wt reduction bags when it comes down to a real fight. so i can really care less that i cant get them all since they r mostly just for show anyways. hehe ;p
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 16 2001 at 10:50 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey moron, can you not see he was posting that as a joke? Maybe if you were literate and didnt get off on flaming. Read the posts through before you make yourself look like an idiot.
Thinking
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2001 at 10:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762493482
14 posts
Yeah, casters don't need 8 strength, but Monks need +40 mana? Whatever dude. Casters can still benefit from this attribute. That's 8 more stones worth of items you can carry. I don't dig the weight for the monk anyway. Anyway, my brother gave me this robe (I always get his hand-me-downs), and I must say it's very nice (being at 37 at the moment). Very nice upgrade to my Crystallined Robe!

alls i know is my wiz started with a 67 STR or something like that.. under 70 i know that.. i look for items for him like this INT>mana>resists>str>everything else.. right now i got this robe with +8int 8str neck and golden bracers (+7int/str) and 4int 2str ears and i can carry a lot ... also the guy above me is right this is a phatty upgrade to Crys Robe...

# Sep 30 2001 at 2:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591768037459
1 post
This should be a Monk robe! Us Monks need the +8 STR and the saves! What was VI thinking when they didn't make this a Monk only item! Why would a caster need +8 STR? Us Monks need it! (nobody posted this type of message for this item so I thought I would)

RE: Monks
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2001 at 10:43 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
ALL classes could use the saves. And regarding strength... a lot of int casters could use the extra strength so they wouldn't get encumbered as easily. I would love to upgrade my robe to this one. Good thing it isn't monk only ;)
▲ Page top
Drop
QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2001 at 11:09 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1593361383486
Scholar
46 posts
This robe dropped off Grup last night in Disco. He spawned under the orange ceiling.

The first pull (arrow shot by a level 52) brought Grup and about five others. After a corpse run and a new tank, we tried him again. A level 57 pulled the surrounding mobs and then Grup single.

Grup hit me for 187 and had some nasty nukes the first time, but with good MR and FR/CR to be safe we took him down easily the second time and I think only one hard nuke landed. Conned blue and I wouldn't recommend anybody try to solo it.
▲ Page top
awesome robe
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2001 at 8:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591768441912
14 posts
I consider this robe to be a nice upgrade to the SMR. For someone with 200+ int, +40 mana is the key stat. It will do nicely until planes. Sells for 5-6K on fennin ro.
▲ Page top
sigh
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2001 at 11:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767199332
6 posts
I wait until the day I get this bad boy..if only I wasn't so poor heh
▲ Page top
Agrees
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 7:02 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757720121
Scholar
21 posts
This item does seem a bit over priced. For the price of this robe you could easily buy enough items to get to 200 int and still have slots and money left over to add to resistance, ac, str, whatever you chose.

I know this thing isn't easy to get but at the same time I would probably just go for a Blighted Robe instead of wasting 12k on this.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 03 2001 at 12:22 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) color blind misinformed goofballs ive gotten 2 so far no its not a common drop off grupilnort it is rare my lvl 60 cleric camps disco quite often in sebilis and yes it is green on a human necro i gave one to a friend who is a human necro he put it on its a kind of pine green with blck borders not sure how much black but i do know the robe is green you dont need to adjust gamma just have the settings correct and not be color blind...fools Docsavage LvL 60 high Priest (Mith Marr)
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 01 2001 at 3:43 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why does this robe sell for so much? The AC is poopy, the int is just about average, and who the hell cares about strength? The magic resist is good, but there are other robes with just as good that has better ac and better stats.
RE: /boggle
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2001 at 8:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247994243
Scholar
78 posts
40 mana is the equivalent of 4 int. Thus, you're looking at 12 int on this, plus the saves (this is easily one of the best robe's to wear for Nagafen), plus the strength. The strength isn't all that great if it was minor, but 8 strength ups your ability to not be encumbered by a significant amount. Strength is of course not an issue to buy this, it's all of it collectively.

And last, it looks nifty. Which is an issue that effects an item's price. =)

Planar will of course be better for a given class. But this is still a nice robe.
▲ Page top
The price...
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2001 at 9:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966037382
69 posts
Im not much on robe pricing, but as mentioned above 40 mana is the equivilant of 4 int. But, once you get to 200 int/wis each point of int or wis only counts for 1 mana, thus the price goes up on this robe. And if you think 40 mana isnt much, try putting on 10 items that give +40 mana and see what you get :-)

Muldaen Foerster - Level 32 Druid of The Rathe Server
May you walk in the ways of Tunare.
